vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd-
vulnerability.group: Verify Permissions on Files with Local Account Information and Credentials

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes the mode of a backup passwd file, which is a standard file permission adjustment. It does not affect running services, SSH, or boot configuration, and follows typical STIG hardening practices.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Incorrect permissions could expose password hashes; Improper chmod syntax could leave file overly permissive
